caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, large black headphones, and a green t-shirt featuring the text "I CON NEVER DO SHIT" is speaking into a professional black microphone. He is positioned in a room that appears to be a studio or clothing store, with several framed pictures on the wall behind him and clothing racks with garments in the background. A white mannequin wearing a white garment stands to his right. In the bottom corners of the screen, logos are visible, including one that reads "THE REAL" and another that says "Bout the Tot". As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his facial expression and head position slightly while continuing to speak into the microphone, but the background setting and his attire remain constant throughout the scene.
